title: BoneClientLite
description: A Performance Orientated Client With Some Fun Multiplayer Features (Based On Adrenaline)
body:
## BonesClientLite
BonesClientLite is a client based on the high-performance modpack called [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline).

## Installation
The installation process and details for BonesClientLite are essentially identical to those of [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline). We highly recommend visiting their page for further information.

## Differences from Adrenaline
BonesClientLite stands apart from [Adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) with its inclusion of specific mods designed to provide access to common server-sided features. These mods include:
- [Custom Player Models](https://modrinth.com/plugin/custom-player-models)
- [Vivecraft Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/vivecraft)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)

Stay tuned for more exciting additions in the near future!
